steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states the mihrab is foundational to traditional mosque architecture and is therefore considered a certain aspect of design. The word “therefore” signals that the blank should restate the idea of essential or fundamental. The second sentence reinforces this: mihrabs appear in all mosques regardless of architectural style, confirming they are definitive, not optional.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Quintessential means “the most perfect or typical example” — it directly extends “foundational” by expressing that something is definitively essential and characteristic. The other choices miss the mark: “unprecedented” contradicts the foundational role, “embellished” describes decoration rather than essential function, and “imposing” describes visual impact rather than structural importance. That matches choice D — D is correct.
